title: Full Stack Developer ( React )
description:
About Us

Innovate. Create. Elevate.

At Vertis, we believe innovation starts with people. We design and deliver exceptional digital solutions that elevate our clients' brands and the experiences they create for their customers. Through technology-driven creativity, we enable meaningful business transformation. Our team is made up of capable, confident, and motivated individuals who collaborate, challenge ideas, and grow together.

About the job

The React Developer will be responsible for designing, developing, and implementing web applications using React for the frontend and Node.js for the backend. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background, expertise in JavaScript programming, and a passion for building scalable and innovative solutions.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design and develop user interfaces for web applications using React.js.
  • Develop server-side logic and APIs using Node.js and Express.js.
  • Design and implement RESTful APIs for data exchange between frontend and backend systems.
  • Integrate third-party APIs and services as needed for application functionality.
  • Design and implement database schemas and models using MongoDB, MySQL, or other NoSQL/SQL databases.
  • Perform database migrations, optimizations, and maintenance tasks.
  • Ensure data security, integrity, and compliance with best practices and standards.
  • Optimize frontend and backend code for performance, scalability, and maintainability.
  • Conduct manual and automated testing of web applications to identify bugs and issues.
  • Collaborate with QA engineers to resolve defects and ensure high-quality deliverables.
  • Document technical specifications, architecture, and implementation details for frontend and backend systems.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including designers, product managers, and other developers, to deliver projects on time and within scope.

Requirement and Qualification

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
  • 3+ years of experience in web development, with a focus on React.js and Node.js development.
  • Proficiency in JavaScript programming and related technologies (e.g., HTML, CSS, ES6).
  • Experience with frontend frameworks/libraries (e.g., Redux, Vue.js) and backend frameworks (e.g., Express.js).
  • Strong understanding of RESTful API design principles and best practices.
  • Experience with database management systems (e.g., MongoDB, MySQL) and ORM libraries.
  • Familiarity with version control systems (e.g., Git) and CI/CD pipelines.
  • Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Benefits

  • Best in class compensation
  • Medical Benefits
  • International and multicultural environment
  • Training & Development
  • Career opportunities in a successful, fast-growing company

Security Requirement (Mandatory)

This role involves work on Singapore Government projects. Candidates must have the legal right to work in Singapore and must be eligible for the required security clearance. Appointment to this role is subject to successful completion of all security vetting and clearance requirements.

Our Hiring Process
After submitting your application, our Talent Acquisition team will review your profile. If your skills and experience align with the role, we'll get in touch to discuss the next steps. Please be cautious of recruitment fraud, only engage with emails from our official team that end with @vertis.digital domain.

Vertis is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We believe that diversity of thought, background, and experience drives innovation and success. That's why we are committed to building and nurturing a team that reflects a wide range of perspectives, abilities, identities, and experiences. At Vertis, every voice matters, and together, we achieve more. We appreciate all applications; however, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you for your interest.

The use of artificial intelligence tools, including language models such as ChatGPT, during the interview process is strictly prohibited and will result in the disqualification of your application.

﻿Singapore Citizens are welcome to apply. This position is supported by IMDA's Company-Led Training Programme.
